docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GOLDMAN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL, KELLY K ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
